content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886
April 11, 2006

Sheldon H. Sloan
Law Office
11111 Santa Monica Blvd. Ste. 230
Los Angeles, CA 90025-3336

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-218

Dear Mr. Sloan:

Based on our recent telephone conversation, this letter confirms that you have requested that Fair Political Practices Commission withdraw your October 27, 2005, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act.1 Consequently, no response will be prepared and your request has been withdrawn.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: William J. Lenkeit
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

WJL:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\05-218

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
